zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch於1049年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯時，她的父親Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch31歲，母親Adèle de Thérouanne16歲。她於1088年與Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1116年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德卡塞享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch于1049年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯时，她的父亲Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch31岁，母亲Adèle de Thérouanne16岁。她于1088年与Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1116年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德卡塞享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Winoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English winche ‘winch, pulley’ (Old English wince), later meaning ‘well’, presumably because a winch would have been used to extract water from a well. The surname is probably a topographic name for someone who lived by a well. Compare Wink . This may also be a topographic name denoting someone who lived by a sharp bend in a river or valley, from a transferred sense of winche ‘winch, pulley’. This term and sense appears to be behind some placenames, such as Wincham (Kent) and Winchbottom (Buckinghamshire).
English: habitational name from East and West Winch (Norfolk). The placenames probably derive from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’.

English: perhaps also a nickname from a further transferred use of the Middle English word in sense 1 above, for a lapwing (compare Middle English lapwink ‘lapwing’, Old English hlēapewince) or other bird known for its leaping and twisting flight.

variants.name: Wink
meanings: from Middle English winke, a form of winche ‘winch, pulley’ (Old English wince), later developing the meaning ‘well’, presumably because a winch would have been used to extract water from a well. The surname is probably for someone who lived by a well. This may also be a topographic name for someone who lived by a sharp bend in a river or valley, from a transferred sense of Middle English winke. Compare Winch 1.

perhaps also a nickname from a further transferred use of the Middle English word in sense 1 above, for a lapwing (compare Middle English lapwink ‘lapwing’, Old English hlēapewince) or any bird known for its leaping and twisting flight. See Winch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch was born in 1049, in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, was 31 and her mother, Adèle de Thérouanne, was 16. She married Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry in 1088. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1116, in Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch est née en 1049, à Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Thérouanne, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry en 1088. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1116, à Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch 1049 in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch 31 und ihre Mutter Adèle de Thérouanne 16. Sie hat 1088 Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1116 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch è nata il nel 1049 nel Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Adèle de Thérouanne, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry nel 1088. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1116, nel Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winochが1049年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードバーグスで生まれた時，父Wautier de Bergues-St. Winochは31歳，母Adèle de Thérouanneは16歳であった。1088年にHugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1116年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカセルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch(이)가 1049년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 버구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle de Thérouanne(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1088년 Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캐셀에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch nasceu em 1049, em Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Thérouanne, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry em 1088. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1116, em Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch родилась в 1049 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Thérouanne, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry в 1088 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1116 г. в местности кассел, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Berghes-St. Winoch nació en 1049, en Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adèle de Thérouanne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Hugo de Tigny seigneur de Tingry en 1088. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1116, en Cassel, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
